title: X input values are not handled correctly in UDPs

features.name: UDP combinational table with 0, 1, and x entries
features.description: Code should include a UDP primitive with a combinational table that has explicit entries for logic values 0, 1, and x

features.name: UDP instantiation with literal '0' input
features.description: Code should include a UDP instantiation that passes a literal '0' as input to a UDP that has table entries for 0, 1, and x

features.name: UDP instantiation with literal '1' input
features.description: Code should include a UDP instantiation that passes a literal '1' as input to a UDP that has table entries for 0, 1, and x
